task_completion.description: Verify that a Thesis item titled 'Non-Cooperative Games' by John Forbes Nash Jr. was created in Zotero.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero main window, an item with the icon for a Thesis, title 'Non-Cooperative Games', and creator 'Nash' or 'John Forbes Nash Jr.' is visible in the items list.

task_completion.description: Verify the detailed metadata for the Thesis item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand pane of Zotero, the Item Type is 'Thesis', the 'Type' field is 'PhD Dissertation', University is 'Princeton University', Date is '1950', and Num Pages is '32'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Patent item titled 'Cryptographic communications system and method' was created in Zotero.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero main window, an item with the icon for a Patent, title 'Cryptographic communications system and method', and creators Rivest, Shamir, and Adleman is visible in the items list.

task_completion.description: Verify the detailed metadata for the Patent item.

task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero main window, an item with the icon for a Report, title 'A History of the ARPANET: The First Decade', and creator 'Bolt Beranek and Newman Inc.' is visible in the items list.

task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero main window, an item with the icon for a Book Section, title 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence', and creator 'Alan Turing' is visible in the items list.

task_completion.description: Verify the detailed metadata for the Book Section item.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Zotero graphical user interface to create the items.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Zotero application window, such as clicking the 'New Item' button and typing into the metadata fields.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or script editors should be used to directly modify the Zotero SQLite database or import files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely entered the metadata into the appropriate Zotero fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The metadata should be visible in the Zotero right-hand pane fields, not just pasted as a single block of text into a note or a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The following titles are verified historical works and should be exactly matched in the Zotero library: Thesis: 'Non-Cooperative Games'; Patent: 'Cryptographic communications system and method'; Report: 'A History of the ARPANET: The First Decade'; Book Section: 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence'.
